zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kaye III於1402年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir Knight John Kaye II32歲，母親Jane Skargill32歲。他於1434年與Jane Lacy在英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1498年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯 卡素享年96歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Kaye III于1402年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Knight John Kaye II32岁，母亲Jane Skargill32岁。他于1434年与Jane Lacy在英国英格兰越可爾武德頌 李斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1498年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯 卡素享年96岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Kaye III was born in 1402, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight John Kaye II, was 32 and his mother, Jane Skargill, was 32. He married Jane Lacy in 1434, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1498, in St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 96, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Briavel Castle, Gloucestershire, Engl: St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kaye III est né en 1402, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight John Kaye II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Skargill, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Jane Lacy en 1434, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1498, à St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 96 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1434 in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1498 im Alter von 96 Jahren in St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Kaye III è nato il nel 1402 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Knight John Kaye II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Jane Skargill, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Jane Lacy nel 1434, nel Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1498, nel St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 96 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kaye IIIが1402年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Knight John Kaye IIは32歳，母Jane Skargillは32歳であった。1434年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズでJane Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1498年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスト ブリエイベルズ カストルで96歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Briavel Castle, Gloucestershire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: John Kaye III(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight John Kaye II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Skargill(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 Jane Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스 카스틀에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Kaye III nasceu em 1402, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight John Kaye II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Skargill, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Lacy em 1434, em Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1498, em St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 96 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Briavel Castle, Gloucestershire, Engl: ст брявелс кастл, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kaye III родился в 1402 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight John Kaye II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Skargill, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Lacy в 1434 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1498 г. в местности ст брявелс кастл, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Kaye III nació en 1402, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Knight John Kaye II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jane Skargill, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jane Lacy en 1434, en Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1498, en St Briavels Castle, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 96 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
